The Feel

Shopify theme Prestige by Maestrooo. Quiet luxury, trade-first: near-black on white, one blush accent, small headings tracked wide. Photography carries the emotion; the interface recedes. This page is set in the same system.

Price convention
£149.17 excl. VAT — trade-oriented pricing, shown ex-tax everywhere.

Architecture

Nine top-level destinations, three-level dropdowns. Four orthogonal shopping facets — tier, attachment type, colour family, length — all assembled automatically from product tags (shade codes like #60B, line tags like LUXE). Copy the tag scheme and the 80 collections build themselves.

  • Luxe Nano Tip
  • Luxe Tape In
  • Luxe Genius Weave

Catalog

768 products. Colour lives in the title (“Luxe Genius Weave #8 Wild Truffle”); the variant is Length | Weight (18″ | 55g → 22″ | 65g). Products per line, from the tag census:

Luxe (all types)143
Nano Tip79
Tape In67
Flat Tip65
I-Tip54
Weave / Weft47
Genius Weave39
Secret Tape34
Tape Weft31
Seamless Clip-In29
Products carrying each line tag (a product can carry several). Largest collections: 18″ (445) · Professional (436) · Shop-by-Colour (432). Prices £0.36–£720; 486 products have multiple images.

Product Model

Why the site feels “informative”: every hair product repeats a four-part editorial formula, averaging ~4,800 characters of structured description.

1 · The colour story

“What Makes This Colour Special” — emotive copy for the specific shade: “a beautifully balanced medium brunette… soft chocolate richness with subtle earthy warmth.”

2 · The method case

“Why Choose Genius Weave?” — benefits of the attachment type: double-drawn Remy hair, flat against the scalp, flexible placement.

3 · Wear & performance

“Wear, Styling & Performance” — how it blends, moves and lasts; links to Aftercare products (which the 190-day guarantee requires — a built-in cross-sell).

4 · The specification

  • WEIGHTS: 55g, 60g, 65g
  • MATERIAL: 100% human hair, Remy, cuticle-correct
  • STYLE: Straight
  • WARRANTY: 190-day guarantee with Viola aftercare

PDP chrome: breadcrumbs → gallery · title · price excl. VAT · Length|Weight dropdown · quantity · solid-ink ADD TO CART → Description / Details / For Use accordions → “You May Also Like”. Luxe products add trade-gating: “exclusively available to trade account holders.”

Gap Analysis

What the Canadian site must gain to read as the same brand.

DimensionUK flagshipCanada today
ThemePrestige — black / white / blush luxuryDefault Dawn look, magenta gradient hero
HeroSeasonal campaign imageryText apology: “bare with us as we are re-designing…”
Navigation9 items · 3-level mega menu · 4 facets6 flat links
Catalog768 products · 80 collectionsGenius Weave shades + small subset; no colour/length facets
Product info~4.8k-char editorial descriptions, 3 accordionsBasic descriptions
Trust layerGuarantee · colour chart · aftercare · FAQs · downloadsNone visible
Education / tradeAcademy, courses, verified trade accountsTrade link only
Footer5 columns, company + registration detailsPolicies + newsletter only
ContactRomsey HQ · 01794 840130416-712-3429 · canadasupport@violahairextensions.co

Roadmap

Recommended sequence for the Canadian rebuild — each step unblocks the next.

  1. License Prestige for the Canadian store and mirror the UK settings: black header, blush announcement bar, Montserrat / Nunito Sans, transparent homepage header.
    Fastest possible route to “same brand” — configuration, not custom development.
  2. Rebuild the navigation from audit/data/nav-tree.json, hiding UK-only branches (wigs, marketing material) until stocked.
    The JSON maps 1:1 onto Shopify menu structures.
  3. Import the catalog from audit/data/products.json for the lines Canada carries — titles, tags, options, descriptions, images — repriced in CAD.
    Keeping the exact tag scheme makes all 80 collections assemble themselves.
  4. Port the trust layer: guarantee, aftercare, colour chart, FAQs, returns — copy already extracted in audit/data/pages/; adapt VAT, phone, address and “longest in the UK” claims for Canada.
    This layer is what separates the UK site from a bare storefront.
  5. Localize: CAD pricing presentation, Canadian shipping & returns policy, announcement-bar message, 416-712-3429 / canadasupport@ contact block in the footer.
  6. Phase 2 — education & trade: verified trade accounts and Academy content if the Canadian operation supports them; otherwise link to the UK academy.
